name: 8ALLOWEEN
short_description: －Rules ・Proceed if nothing is unusual. ・Turn back if you encounter something strange. ・Aim for the exit. ◆ Walking Simulator Inspired by the 8th exit, this game requires sound for identifying anomalies. Use speakers or headphones. Contains mild horror elements. Playtime: 20-60 minutes.
detailed_description:
You are trapped in a Halloween mansion

To escape, follow the rules and take action accordingly.

－Rules－

・Proceed if there is nothing unusual.

・Turn back if you encounter something strange.

・Head toward the exit, which is your goal.

◆8th Like's Walking Simulator

"8ALLOWEEN" is a walking simulator inspired by the 8th exit and other similar concepts.

◆Anomalies that Emit Sound

Some anomalies require identification by sound.

Therefore, it is recommended to use speakers or headphones.

◆This game contains mild horror elements.

◆Playtime

The expected playtime is 20 to 60 minutes.

Video Distribution Guidelines

  • Individuals and organizations alike are allowed to upload and stream videos without prior permission.

  • Monetization is permitted only when using the features provided by the video distribution platform.

  • We would appreciate it if you could include the game’s name in the video or stream title, and add a link to the official page or store page in the description.

  • We bear no responsibility for any damages that may occur as a result of uploading or streaming videos related to this game.

  • These guidelines are subject to change without prior notice.

"Please report bugs here."
